Job description

Job Title: AI/ML Engineer Fresher


Department: Data Science & Machine Learning


Role: Data Science & Machine Learning Other


Location: Coimbatore , Tamil Nadu


Job Overview:

We are looking for a curious and analytical AI/ML Engineer Fresher to join our Data Science & Machine Learning team. The candidate will assist in building and optimizing machine learning models, analyzing datasets, and contributing to AI-driven solutions. This role is ideal for freshers who are passionate about AI, machine learning, and data-driven problem-solving.


Key Responsibilities:

Assist in developing and testing machine learning models.
Collect, clean, and preprocess datasets for training and evaluation.
Support the team in performing data analysis and visualization.
Experiment with different algorithms and techniques to improve model performance.
Collaborate with team members to integrate ML models into applications or solutions.
Stay updated with latest trends and research in AI and ML.
Key Skills:

Knowledge of Python, R, or similar programming languages.
Familiarity with machine learning libraries such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch.
Understanding of statistics, data preprocessing, and model evaluation metrics.
Analytical mindset and problem-solving ability.
Good communication and ability to work collaboratively in a team.

Role: Data Science & Machine Learning - Other
Industry Type: IT Services & Consulting
Department: Data Science & Analytics
Employment Type: Full Time, Permanent
Role Category: Data Science & Machine Learning

UG: B.Tech/B.E. - Bachelor of Technology / Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Data Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning
